title: lasianthus pseudostipularis
intro: Lasianthus pseudostipularis, also known as the False Stipular Lasianthus, is a plant species in the family Theaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. Its health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Lasianthus pseudostipularis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat these conditions.
